# hooks

Enforcement layers that wire the `dox` CLI into wherever edits happen. Each layer is deterministic; the model is only invoked to write prose when a check fails.

<!-- dox:index -->
<!-- generated by `dox sync` - do not edit by hand -->
### Map
- [`claude/`](claude/AGENTS.md) - In-loop enforcement for Claude Code. `dox-context.sh` (PreToolUse) injects the AGENTS.md chain for the edited path; `dox-gate.sh` (Stop) ...
<!-- /dox:index -->
